A.name: Information Consumption
A.measures: How the agent explores and reads files — sequential vs breadth-first vs targeted

B.name: Production Style
B.measures: How the agent creates output — detailed vs minimal vs creative

C.name: Organization Behavior
C.measures: How the agent structures files and directories — nested vs flat vs by-type

D.name: Iteration Strategy
D.measures: How the agent refines work — incremental edits vs large rewrites vs ship-fast

E.name: Work Rhythm
E.measures: How the agent paces work — phased planning vs bursty vs sprint

F.name: Cross-Modal Behavior
F.measures: How the agent handles non-text files — visual-heavy vs text-only vs balanced
